activation_goal.label: freeze Hermes as the product runtime substrate owner
activation_goal.summary: RedCube Gateway and Domain Harness OS now run on a repo-tracked Hermes-backed runtime substrate while Codex-local host-agent stays only as a transition deployment host, regression bridge, or development shell.

in_scope: freeze Hermes as the runtime substrate owner for routed deliverable execution
keep CLI as the default formal entry and MCP as the supported protocol layer
keep controller as an internal-only surface
preserve program_id/topic_id/deliverable_id/run_id boundaries and canonical audit/watch/review/projection surfaces
demote Codex-local host-agent runtime to transition deployment host, regression bridge, or development shell only

promotion_invariants: RedCube remains the visual-deliverable domain gateway plus Domain Harness OS
MCP remains the supported protocol layer
object model, artifact schema, gate semantics, audit/watch/report surfaces must not drift
old Codex-local runtime cannot continue as the long-term product runtime owner
